name: HP INC
summary: HP Inc. is a global technology company operating in over 170 countries, offering personal computing devices, printing hardware, supplies, services, and subscriptions. Products include AI PCs, workstations, notebooks, desktops, office and home printers, large-format graphics solutions, and 3D printing systems. HP serves consumers, SMBs, enterprises, and public sector customers through Personal Systems, Printing, and Corporate Investments segments.

products.name: AI PCs and Workstations
products.description: Z-line workstations and AI PCs with integrated AI acceleration from Intel, AMD, and NVIDIA GPUs.

products.name: Commercial PC Portfolio
products.description: Pro, Elite, Dragonfly, Chromebook, thin clients, and retail POS systems for enterprise and SMB customers.

products.name: Consumer PC Portfolio
products.description: Omni, Omen, Victus, Spectre, Envy, Pavilion, and Chromebook PCs for gaming, learning, and home use.

products.name: Office Printers
products.description: Security-enhanced office printers for SMBs, public sector, and large enterprises, including OEM hardware.

products.name: Home Printers
products.description: Innovative security-enhanced printing products for home, home business, and micro business customers.

products.name: Graphics Solutions
products.description: Large-format, commercial, and industrial printers and presses for print service providers and packaging converters.

products.name: 3D Printing & Personalization
products.description: Additive manufacturing solutions and supplies for commercial and industrial digital manufacturing.

products.name: Supplies
products.description: Ink and laser cartridges and other consumable products for HP printers.

products.name: Endpoint Security Software
products.description: Hardware-enforced endpoint security software for HP and non-HP PCs using AI deep-learning malware detection.

products.name: Lifecycle Services
products.description: Support, deployment, configuration, and extended warranty services for PCs and mobility installed base.

partnerships.description: HP supports Windows operating system across its PC platforms.
HP supports Chrome OS across its PC platforms, including Chromebook lines.
HP incorporates Intel processors with integrated AI acceleration in its platforms.
HP incorporates AMD processors with integrated AI acceleration in its platforms.
HP uses NVIDIA GPUs for advanced graphics and compute workloads in its devices.
